unmapped.human_action: Do not initiate new LLY or NVO options positions at current peak hype convergence. Deep OTM originator calls are a mechanically leveraged expression of a thesis the market has fully absorbed. Review Bachem and Polypeptide Group most recent quarterly IR for capex trajectory and order-book language. Flag any FDA drug shortage status change for GLP-1 analogs for immediate decision-packet review. The CDMO watchlist thesis requires a US-accessible expression vehicle before it becomes actionable — no such vehicle currently exists in the scanner universe.
unmapped.legal_disclaimer: This issue is for informational purposes only and does not constitute investment advice. All positions referenced are paper trading positions held for research and tracking purposes.
unmapped.machine_action: Monitor Bachem (BALN.SW) and Polypeptide Group (PPTY.ST) quarterly filings for capacity expansion announcements, capex deferrals, or order-book commentary. Track FDA drug shortage database for GLP-1 analog status changes. Flag LLY or NVO convergence score degradation from peak hype tier as a potential thesis-inflection signal. Alert if any CDMO name or comparable enters the US-listed options scanner universe. Note scanner data staleness — current scan is from April 28, approximately seven weeks prior to publication.
unmapped.position_conflict_disclosure: The paper book holds a small long equity position in LLY (LT-LLY-2026-06-12, longevity basket, entry $1,133.00, pct_pnl -3.07% as of last mark). This issue advises against new LLY options exposure. The existing equity position expresses a longevity thesis, not obesity-cycle momentum, and is not addressed by this issue's recommendation. No position exists in any CDMO name.
unmapped.uncertainty: The manufacturing-constraint thesis rests on Bachem and Polypeptide Group IR as primary sources; no independent CDMO order-book data is available. The FDA shortage-list resolution timeline is not publicly forecasted. Telehealth revenue exposure estimate is sourced from company IR only. Scanner data is seven weeks stale; IV levels and exact asymmetry scores may have moved materially.

original_issue.falsification: Bachem or Polypeptide Group IR discloses order-book softening or capex deferral, indicating manufacturing constraint is resolving faster than the thesis assumes without the compensating originator supply signal. Lilly or Novo Nordisk announces vertical integration of peptide API capacity sufficient to materially reduce external CDMO dependence, collapsing the picks-and-shovels diversification thesis. FDA resolves the GLP-1 shortage in a way that collapses compounding-pharmacy volume without the originator supply growth that would validate the capacity-buildout thesis — breaking the shared-driver logic chain. CDMO names, once accessible via US-listed instruments, trade with sustained correlation to originator franchise risk, eliminating the diversification benefit the picks-and-shovels framing requires.

claims.statement: The GLP-1 options market has converged on deep out-of-the-money originator calls at peak hype pricing while the picks-and-shovels CDMO manufacturing layer — where the corpus locates the durable structural exposure — has no US derivatives expression; the decision packet verdict is watchlist_candidate because the expression vehicle does not yet exist in the accessible universe.
claims.falsification: Bachem or Polypeptide Group IR discloses order-book softening or capex deferral, indicating manufacturing constraint is resolving faster than the thesis assumes without the compensating originator supply signal. Lilly or Novo Nordisk announces vertical integration of peptide API capacity sufficient to materially reduce external CDMO dependence, collapsing the picks-and-shovels diversification thesis. FDA resolves the GLP-1 shortage in a way that collapses compounding-pharmacy volume without the originator supply growth that would validate the capacity-buildout thesis — breaking the shared-driver logic chain. render.body: Everyone Priced the Drug; No One Priced the Factory

render.heading: Thesis
render.body: The GLP-1 options market has converged on deep out-of-the-money originator calls at peak hype pricing while the picks-and-shovels CDMO manufacturing layer — where the corpus locates the durable structural exposure — has no US derivatives expression; the decision packet verdict is watchlist_candidate because the expression vehicle does not yet exist in the accessible universe.

render.heading: Signals
render.body:
LLY and NVO options at peak hype convergence on deep OTM strikes: April 28 scanner sweep returned five passing contracts in peptides, all on LLY. Top asymmetry score in the full scanner — 11.5 — on a $1,055 call with underlying at $872.65, 20.9% OTM, IV 42.9%, convergence 0.80 (peak hype). Next four rows are $1,050-$1,080 strikes, 30-50 DTE, IV 41-43%. NVO clears one row at 0.68 convergence. Hims and Hers returns zero passing contracts despite explicit compounded GLP-1 revenue disclosure in quarterly IR. Asymmetry score reflects mechanical leverage of the structure, not a mispricing gap. (strength: 0.9)

Peptide API CDMO capex as leading indicator of shortage-resolution clock: Bachem and Polypeptide Group quarterly IR document active capacity expansion. CDMO capex timeline is the same variable that governs FDA shortage-list resolution pace. Originator internal expansion adds capacity, but external CDMO layer sets the earliest ramp window. Both names are EU-listed with no US options expression. Primary IR sourced from Bachem, Polypeptide Group, Lilly, and Novo Nordisk filings. (strength: 0.8)

FDA shortage-list status as binary gate for 503A and 503B compounding channel: Shortage-list resolution is binary — no appeal, no phase-out — and governs whether compounding pharmacies may legally dispense GLP-1 analogs. Originator capacity buildout is the necessary condition for resolution. Documented from primary FDA shortage and enforcement alert databases. High source quality. (strength: 0.85)

DTC telehealth compounded GLP-1 revenue contingent on shortage status, zero options expression: Hims and comparable DTC platforms disclose material compounded GLP-1 revenues in quarterly IR with explicit contingency language tied to shortage-list status. Zero passing scanner contracts for any DTC telehealth name. Medium source quality — IR disclosures only, no independent prescription volume verification. Treat as a monitor signal rather than a high-conviction expression. (strength: 0.75)

render.heading: What would falsify it
render.body: Bachem or Polypeptide Group IR discloses order-book softening or capex deferral, indicating manufacturing constraint is resolving faster than the thesis assumes without the compensating originator supply signal. Lilly or Novo Nordisk announces vertical integration of peptide API capacity sufficient to materially reduce external CDMO dependence, collapsing the picks-and-shovels diversification thesis. FDA resolves the GLP-1 shortage in a way that collapses compounding-pharmacy volume without the originator supply growth that would validate the capacity-buildout thesis — breaking the shared-driver logic chain. CDMO names, once accessible via US-listed instruments, trade with sustained correlation to originator franchise risk, eliminating the diversification benefit the picks-and-shovels framing requires.
